pullRequest.title: chore: pytest plugin now uses native subtest status labels without redundant parameter suffixes
feat: Use captured response data in the examples phase
feat: Support for custom content types in `multipart/form-data` encoding via OpenAPI's `encoding` property
feat: Support for recording VCR and HAR reports from the `pytest` plugin
pullRequest.body: Though `pytest-xdist` support is coming later. Resolves #701

pullRequest.title: feat: `--max-redirects` CLI & config file option
chore(pytest): Schemas with infinitely recursive references are reported as failures
feat: Config file
chore: Report all distinct JSON Schema errors per response in `response_schema_conformance` and `response_headers_conformance`
fix: Incorrect reference resolution scope change when resolving responses
feat: `schemathesis.pytest.parametrize()` for testing multiple named schemas in a single test function
feat: Pin `discriminator` property to the correct value when generating data for `oneOf`/`anyOf` schemas
feat: Open API aware auth config
feat: Support for validating `requests` / `httpx` / `werkzeug` responses in `Case.validate_response`
fix: Curl commands with non-printable characters now use shell-aware escaping and display warnings for unknown shells
feat: Negative testing for GraphQL
feat: Generate examples for optional properties & one disjoint set per `oneOf` / `anyOf` branch
chore: Report cURL commands for some network-level errors
chore: Cleanup pytest output
feat: Allure report integration
chore: Clarify warnings and make them configurable
chore: Improved failure messages for `ignored_auth`
chore: Generate at least one non-NULL character in path parameters
fix: Internal error on building a JUnit report if the same failures appear multiple times across multiple test phases
fix: Incorrect auth detection in `ignored_auth` when it is passed to `call` or `call_and_validate`
fix: Combining CLI filter options with config file-based filtering
fix: Do not send explicitly passed headers for the `missing_required_header` check
fix: Negative test cases with invalid parameters mistakenly becoming positive test cases
fix: `format: uuid` now generates RFC 4122 compliant UUIDs
fix: Empty path parameter in the negative tests
fix: Ignoring some string formats during positive test case generation in the coverage phase
feat: Allow YAML response schema validation
pullRequest.body:
🚨Please review the [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/schemathesis/schemathesis/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Description

Partially resolves #2934

### Checklist

- [x] Added failing tests for the change (approval updated)
- [x] All new and existing tests pass
- [x] Added changelog entry
- [ ] Updated README/documentation, if necessary

pullRequest.title: feat: Response deserializer hook for non-JSON schema conformance checks
chore: Consider connection error as a failed API probe
chore: Do not display API probing errors in CLI output
chore: Display cURL code samples on more network errors
feat: `enabled` config file option to disable all test phases
feat: A way to add aliases to existing serializers
feat: Open API links inference from Location headers
pullRequest.body:
Resolves #2953

- [x] Run on 201 responses on POST API operations during `examples` / `coverage` / `fuzzing` phases, unless there is already a link
- [ ] If other phases are disabled - run a quick set of API calls on POST / PUT (with filters applied) to get `Location` values (or postpone it to another PR?)
- [x] For errors in inferred links, the messaging should be different - it is a bug in Schemathesis if they don't work properly
- [x] Ensure inference takes the filters into account.
- [x] Investigate test flakiness
- [x] Base path can be present in relative urls too
- [ ] Check the logic manually on DRF
- [x] Display number of inferred links in CLI (use the `x-inferred` attribute)
- [x] Maybe just have “algorithms” config instead of “enable”? To avoid having two ways to disable it
- [x] Document this feature (mention popular frameworks that add `Location` automatically)
- [x] Consider adding links to other API operations (e.g. `PATCH` / `PUT` with the same prefix)
- [x] Config option to enable / disable it for the stateful phase? Useful at least for testing
- [x] Improve wording in the docs
- [x] Strip base path from `Location`
- [x] If `Location` contains query parameters - add it to the generated link?
- [x] Test - there should be a bug in GET, which should be discovered via an automatically inferred link
- [x] Test - parameters extraction in isolation (evaluate that runtime expression)

pullRequest.title: feat: Option to make warnings cause test failures
fix: Incorrect serialization of parameters with nested structures during the coverage phase
fix: Generating negative test cases incorrectly marked as invalid if `anyOf` is present
fix: Internal error if the stateful phase is used with `--generation-unique-inputs`
fix: Set correct data generation mode for stateful test cases if after adding stateful data, a negative test case becomes positive
fix: Parameter overrides replacing all explicit examples instead of merging with them
fix: Escape examples for path parameters
fix: Internal error on incorrect value for `--tls-verify` when the schema URL is accessed via HTTPs
docs: Add a search bar
fix: `workers = "auto"` being incorrectly rejected in configuration files
chore: Make `before_call` hook accept `kwargs` instead of `**kwargs` in a backward compatible way
fix: Coverage phase hanging on endpoints with many optional parameters due to combinatorial explosion
fix: False positives in `ignored_auth` check if auth is declared as optional
fix: Fixed false positives in `negative_data_rejection` check for array of strings query parameters
feat: Server-Sent Events response validation
fix: False positives in `negative_data_rejection` check when test cases are modified after generation by hooks, stateful testing, or auth providers
fix: False positive schema errors
fix: Internal error when generating valid instance against an array of types
fix: do not require tomli for projects with python 3.11+
pullRequest.body:
### Description

Added condition for including `tomli` to dependencies (do not require it for projects with python 3.11+)

Closes #3199 

### Checklist

- [x] Added changelog entry

pullRequest.title: fix: Extracting incomplete schema-level and property-level examples when parent schema with `allOf` has its own complete example
chore: Suppress `HypothesisWarning` when overriding built-in string formats via `schemathesis.openapi.format()`
chore: Replace archived `backoff` with `tenacity`
fix: Custom format strategies returning binary data
feat: Support pytest 9
fix: Propagation of base_url to ignored_auth check
fix: Incorrect HTTP method shown in failure headers during coverage phase
fix: Positive test cases generated without required body
fix: Incorrect error message when combining `@schema.given()` with schema examples
fix: Invalid examples extracted from schemas with `allOf` and required fields
fix: False positives for `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` bodies in negative testing
fix: Custom media type strategies now apply when `encoding.contentType` is an array
fix: Ignoring strategies for custom media types in the coverage phase
fix: Authentication headers are no longer re-applied during negative testing when intentionally removed
fix: False positive `API rejected schema-compliant request` for `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` with required body but no required properties
fix: Nested external `$ref` links in multi-file schemas not resolving relative to their containing file
fix: False positive in `negative_data_rejection` check when multiple mutations conflict
fix: Support `$ref` inside link definitions in Open API 3.1
fix: `auth` argument passed to `call_and_validate` not being recognized by the `ignored_auth` check
fix: Stateful testing crash on links with nested `$ref`s
fix: Examples phase generating invalid data for schemas with `anyOf`/`oneOf` containing only `required` constraints
fix: CLI headers not being passed to schema loading requests
fix: Duplicate entries in `required` array causing "non-unique elements" schema validation errors
fix: Hooks receiving `GeneratedValue` wrappers instead of raw dicts
fix: False positive `negative_data_rejection` failures due to unknown `format` values
fix: Coverage phase generating schema-invalid positive values for schemas with `anyOf`/`oneOf` and `required` constraints
fix: `missing_required_header` check incorrectly failing when the server returns 401 for a missing non-Authorization required header
chore: Ditch pytest-subtests
fix: False positive `negative_data_rejection` for `application/xml` bodies in the coverage phase
fix: Coverage phase silently replacing path parameter values with `"value"` when a custom format generates strings containing `/`
fix: Examples phase not escaping path examples containing `/`
fix: hostname generation on older Open API schemas
fix: Path generation now keeps explicit user-provided slash values
fix: Flaky `does not match any API operations` on repeated pytest runs
fix: `[auth.openapi.*]` HTTP Basic authentication now correctly applied when using WSGI or ASGI apps in pytest mode
fix: False positive `use_after_free` when the server reuses deleted ids
feat: Hint when Hypothesis-generated extra properties are the likely cause of rejection
fix: Correctly resolve `$ref` inside `oneOf`/`anyOf` sub-schemas during the coverage phase
fix: False positive `negative_data_rejection` for path parameters with `format: uuid` and a `pattern` constraint
fix: Correctly report "Schema Error" for malformed request body media types
fix: Base URL truncated with an ellipsis in the startup summary on narrow terminals
feat: Declarative dynamic auth
fix: `flatmap_*` hooks raising `RuntimeError` in negative testing mode
fix: `AttributeError` on `DoctestItem` when schemathesis plugin is loaded
fix: Make dynamic auth work with WSGI & ASGI transports
chore: `--wait-for-schema` now retries on HTTP 503 responses
fix: False positive `positive_data_acceptance` for path parameters containing null bytes
fix: False positive `negative_data_rejection` for `type: integer` query parameters mutated to array
fix: Sibling keywords on `$ref` properties ignored in examples phase for OAS 3.1 schemas
fix: JUnit XML missing `unsupported_method` failures from coverage phase
fix: Double JSON encoding for `content: application/json` query parameters in coverage phase
fix: False positive `negative_data_rejection` for integer query parameters with type mutations
feat: `schemathesis.openapi.require_security_scheme()` for scoping auth providers to specific OpenAPI security schemes
fix: False positive `positive_data_acceptance` when `propertyNames` restricts object keys and `additionalProperties` is present in the coverage phase
fix: False positive `negative_data_rejection` for `multipart/form-data` fields with `format: binary` and `nullable: true` in the coverage phase
fix: `before_call` hook setting a missing required header in the coverage phase had no effect
fix: Use the matching registered serializer for multipart fields with `encoding.contentType`
fix: `auth` API on `LazySchema` to match `BaseSchema`
fix: False positive `negative_data_rejection` for body-level type mutations on `multipart/form-data` endpoints
